title: Business Scope
summary: Qingdao Sunwing Technology Service Co., Ltd. mainly produce birthday candles,scented candles,dinner candles,tealight candles,bright household candles,etc,the wax could be paraffin wax,natural soy wax,beeswax,we afford flexible candles customized services,please contact us freely for further cooperation.
